perItemFindings.label: ass:vc-localized-envelope
perItemFindings.one_line: This is a localized finite-VC empirical-process theorem, not a modeling assumption; the plan keeps it as define-local Prop hypothesis even though Causalean.Stat.Concentration.localized_uniform_deviation_expectation plus vcLocalizedEnvelope are present, axiom-clean, and match the fixed-radius in-expectation envelope substrate the node needs.

perItemFindings.label: ass:vc-localized-offset-envelope
perItemFindings.one_line: This is an offset/Rademacher empirical-process theorem, not a modeling assumption; the plan keeps it as define-local Prop hypothesis even though Causalean.Stat.Concentration.localized_offset_expectation is present, axiom-clean, and states the self-localizing offset positive-part envelope the node needs after the margin-coupling bridge.

verbatim_critique: Re-plan ass:vc-localized-envelope and ass:vc-localized-offset-envelope. They cannot remain plain assumptions merely because the deterministic kind gate wanted assumption-kind coverage: under the substrate-fact policy they must either be discharged as derived reuse lemmas from the Causalean localized-envelope substrate (localized_uniform_deviation_expectation/vcLocalizedEnvelope and localized_offset_expectation) and then dropped from consumers' hyps, or explicitly marked defer_tier substrate-gates if the bridge lemmas are not yet built. The ass:iid/S4 reuse of Causalean.Stat.IIDSample is type-fit and sound.
